text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the intense Shuka Sho, Daiwa Scarlet reveals
more growth than Vodka and takes the win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Daiwa Scarlet makes a show of
telling Vodka that she'll be defeating her again at
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before walking off, she tells Vodka she will also
be running in the Queen Elizabeth II Cup before
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling that she's not progressing as well as
Daiwa Scarlet, who always has a clear goal,
Vodka decides to run in the Arima Kinen as well.
